hero.title: Spaces designed to be lived in.
hero.subtitle: Over two decades designing homes, businesses and renovations with an honest eye on place, light and craft.

about.title: About
about.body: I'm an architect based in Costa Rica. My work starts by listening — to the client and to the site. Each project looks for a clear balance between function, materials and context. I've worked with families and businesses on new builds, additions and renovations where the priority is always to build well, quietly.

design.title: Architectural design
design.description: Concept, plans and technical specs for new residential and commercial work.

renovation.title: Renovation
renovation.description: Interventions on existing buildings to update, expand and improve livability.

construction.title: Construction supervision
construction.description: On-site technical oversight to keep quality, schedule and design intent on track.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.description: Guidance on lot purchase, project feasibility and municipal permits.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Tell me about your project. I answer personally.
